response.justification: Bogdan is a capable polyglot engineer with real distributed-systems exposure (millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby) and a long career, but the resume contains virtually no signal on the core competencies this role demands: experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B test infrastructure, rollout-risk management, telemetry pipelines, or growth measurement systems. The position is Principal/IC6, requiring demonstrated cross-org ownership of experimentation frameworks; the candidate's highest title is Staff SWE at a small consultancy with no evidence of that scope. General full-stack and open-source breadth does not substitute for the specialized growth-and-experimentation depth the JD explicitly requires.
strengths: Polyglot background (TypeScript, C++, C#, Java, DLang) maps to several languages listed in the JD's required tech stack
Hands-on distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests/second, showing production-scale credibility
Open-source platform leadership (GISCollective) and community teaching (workshops, talks) demonstrate initiative beyond individual-contributor scope
concerns: Zero documented experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing, or rollout-risk management — the explicit core of this role
No telemetry, metrics infrastructure, or data-aptitude evidence; growth engineering and statistical analysis are entirely absent from the resume
Seniority gap: current and past titles (Senior/Staff SWE) are below Principal/IC6, with no evidence of the cross-team architectural ownership or org-wide platform impact expected at this level

key_factors.factor: Seniority below Principal/IC6 with no scope evidence
